MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT POLLACK LAW, LLC (DBA THE FIGHTING FOR PEOPLE, RONALD POLLACK, POLLACKSTEINBERG, LLP's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of Kristen Hayes and Integrated General Co to withdraw as counsel for Defendant Pollack Law LLC is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.
